prompt: Screenshot mockup of a Roblox game dialogue UI in action. Shows a sleek dark dialogue box at the bottom of the screen with an NPC portrait on the left side showing a 3D character face, a gold speaker name above the dialogue text, typewriter-style text being revealed character by character, and 3 choice buttons below with numbered options. The game scene behind shows a fantasy RPG village. Professional game UI, polished. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio.
